steps.title: Identify the human condition in the final image
steps.content: The poem ends by describing a human as “a lofty soul in dreams and visions wrapped, / But in the stifling flesh securely trapped.” This directly establishes the human condition: aspirations and ideals limited by physical constraints.

steps.title: Match the condition to the correct answer
steps.content: The matching choice identifies the exact challenge: aspirations that cannot be fulfilled because of certain limitations. The other choices address issues the poem never discusses—taming animals, motivation, and emotional control. This matches the correct answer — D is correct.
